---
title: "Morgane Gonon"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: CIRED
      href: https://www.centre-cired.fr/en/
    - text: AgroParisTech
      href: https://www.agroparistech.fr/en
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PE5P9CoAAAAJ
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/morgane-gonon-861879106/
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-4811-4442
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/MGononDufour
---

<br>

Welcome! I am a PhD candidate in Economics at [CIRED](https://www.centre-cired.fr/en/) and [AgroParisTech](https://www.agroparistech.fr/en), [Université Paris-Saclay](https://www.universite-paris-saclay.fr/en).

I examine the political economy of environmental finance instruments, macro-financial constraints on sustainability transitions, and the institutional economics of North–South environmental funding. Empirical work spans Senegal, Colombia, and France. I develop the **F–A–E framework** (Funding sources – implementing Agents – Ecological Actions) to analyse the contextual adequacy of financing instruments across income regimes and governance structures. Methods include Stock-Flow Consistent (SFC) macroeconomic modelling, econometrics, and mixed-methods empirical research.

Empirical work examines official development assistance for biodiversity at the global scale, voluntary carbon markets in Senegal, biodiversity-harmful subsidies in France, and sovereign debt strategies for Colombia's ecological transition.

I am also an Associate Researcher at the [French Development Agency (AFD)](https://www.afd.fr/en) and a Fellow of the [Earth System Governance Research Network](https://www.earthsystemgovernance.org/).

**Contact**: morgane.gonon [at] agroparistech.fr
